blue_oceans.name: Daily Gardening Skill Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies gardening knowledge with XP: soil reading, seed starting, companion planting, pest ID, composting ratios. Zero streak apps in a 5.6M community.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Hiking Training Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies hiking skill building with streak XP: elevation gain training, blister prevention, map reading, bear canister packing. AllTrails is logbook not skill game.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Houseplant Mastery Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies houseplant mastery with streak XP: one propagation attempt, one deficiency diagnosed, one pest treated. 3.4M community, zero skill-gamification apps.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Wilderness Camping Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies wilderness skill acquisition with streak XP. 3.38M community doing it passively. Fire starting to advanced navigation — zero skill-gamification layer exists.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Fishing Skills Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies fishing skill building with streak XP. 2.12M community. Fishbrain has streak for catches not for skill. Fly fishing technique school in gamified daily format is wide open.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Prepper Skills Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies prepper skill building with streak XP. 1.98M community. Pure gear apps exist. Zero apps turn daily skill practice into an XP-gated progression system.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Homesteading Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies homesteading as a daily skill system with XP. 1.53M community. Chicken hatching calculators exist but zero apps gamify the full homestead skill tree with level gates.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Rock Climbing Training Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies climbing training drills with streak XP. 940K community. Apps log sends; none turn daily hangboard/technique/footwork drills into an XP progression game.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Bird Watching Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies birding skill building with streak XP. 930K community. Merlin is a reference tool. Daily calls practice, habitat study, and species knowledge tree as XP game is fully open.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Sourdough Baking Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies the sourdough craft as a daily streak with XP. 930K community. Calculator apps solve one problem. Turning starter health, bulk ferment timing, and shaping into an XP game is open.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Bushcraft Skills Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies bushcraft skill building with streak XP and skill tree progression. 770K community. Reference apps exist; the gamification layer converting daily practice to XP is open.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Fermentation Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies fermentation mastery with streak XP. 760K community across 3 fermentation subs. Daily brine ratio practice, airlock monitoring, and flavor development as XP game is open.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Foraging Practice Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies foraging skill building with streak XP. 610K passionate safety-conscious community. ID apps exist; turning daily identification practice and safety knowledge into an XP game is open.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Composting Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies composting as a daily streak with XP. 390K community. Turning carbon/nitrogen ratio management and temperature monitoring into a skill progression game is fully open.

blue_oceans.name: Daily Herbal Medicine Streak
blue_oceans.notes: No app gamifies herbalism mastery with streak XP. 620K community. Safety-critical knowledge domain with passionate audience and zero gamified learning layer.
